# HPD.ML.Abstractions.IGeneratorTransform&lt;TState&gt;

- Package: `HPD-ML-Abstractions` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Abstractions`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Abstractions`
- Kind: `interface`

Stateful transform: seed input produces variable-length output stream. Each output feeds back as input to the next step. Used for autoregressive generation, Monte Carlo simulation, recursive expansion.

Concrete implementations may also implement IChatClient from Microsoft.Extensions.AI for chat middleware interop.

## Declaration

```csharp
public interface IGeneratorTransform<TState> : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```


Produce one output and advance state. Null = generation complete.
